trigger: User requested activation of a self-improvement agent skill.
problem: No standalone self-improvement skill was installed or discoverable in the active Codex skills directory.
root_cause: The workflow existed as separate base skills, but no composed skill package was present.
solution: Composed the workflow from 5 base skills and generated an installable self-improvement-agent skill.
failed_approaches: Search only curated remote skill list
Search only current repo worktree for SKILL.md
reusable_pattern: If a meta-skill is missing, chain existing base skills and generate a composite installable skill.
